title: ModelList
description: Params out for GET /api/models: every GLB the preview server can serve, newest first.

dir.description: Absolute path of the directory being served.

name.description: File name, also the value of the ?model= query parameter.

uri.description: Path the browser fetches the bytes from, served as model/gltf-binary.

modifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC mtime. The list is sorted by this, newest first.

triangles.description: Read from the GLB. Absent when the file could not be parsed.

readable.description: false when the file exists but does not parse as a GLB.
